name: the-distillist-monorepo
description: Railway/Railpack entry only — use `cd frontend && npm run dev` for local frontend work

scripts.build: cd frontend && npm ci && npm run build
scripts.dev:clean: bash scripts/kill-dev-ports.sh && concurrently -k -n front,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.dev:api: cd backend && (test -x .venv/bin/python && exec .venv/bin/python manage.py runserver || exec python3 manage.py runserver)
